title: trichomanes decurrens
intro: Trichomanes decurrens, also known as the running fern, is a type of terrestrial fern native to the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trichomanes decurrens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. The herbal preparation of Trichomanes decurrens typically involves drying the leaves and roots, which can then be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
